purpose: Black-box and packet-level audit cases for long-running Vibe routing chaos: shortlist noise, missing module coverage, control-word leakage, and host-surface collapse.

cases.prompt: 构建贪吃蛇游戏 训练机器学习模型 在游戏中虚拟训练 AI 玩贪吃蛇 可运行演示
symptoms_to_catch: statistics-facing skills enter because generic model wording is over-expanded
planning leakage pulls in unrelated study-plan style skills
weak textual evidence introduces debug or GPU helpers too early

failure_examples: the surfaced set contains only analysis or helper skills and never reveals a game or demo builder lane
the surfaced set contains only implementation or debug noise and never reveals model training

cases.prompt: React 前端性能回归，点击筛选后页面卡顿并伴随 failing test 和 stack trace，请系统排查 root cause
symptoms_to_catch: software regression is misread as statistical regression
statistics owners outrank debugging owners

failure_examples: the surfaced set explains regression only as a statistics concept
the shortlist never exposes a real software debugging or profiling lane

cases.prompt: 做脓毒症公共数据库研究：检索 full-text 文献，提取样本量和 effect size，做统计比较，再写通俗综述并整理成汇报
symptoms_to_catch: one delivery-oriented skill becomes the primary story and hides the research stack
multi-module task is surfaced as too few usable skills

failure_examples: the surfaced set talks about polishing or one writer helper but not literature plus statistics plus reporting together
the surfaced set omits either the data-analysis step or the downstream reader-facing report step

cases.prompt: 做一个可用的数据看板前端，接着部署 preview，再根据 pytest 和 coverage 输出生成测试报告
symptoms_to_catch: router fails to surface any usable local candidate for a composite delivery task
fallback top rows are unrelated pool-building or generic skills

failure_examples: the surfaced set has no front-end builder lane at all
the surfaced set mentions generic planning only and never exposes preview or report packaging

cases.prompt: 完成一个机器学习实验交付：训练 baseline，做 figure，整理 scientific report，并输出组会 slides
symptoms_to_catch: one delivery surface dominates and hides the rest of the bundle
setup-style or unrelated utility skills leak into the shortlist

failure_examples: the surfaced set only talks about training and never exposes report or slides
the surfaced set only talks about one delivery artifact and hides the experiment core

cases.prompt: 接手一个已经变得臃肿的 Python 服务：先抽象领域模型和边界，再重设计模块接口，做一个小型原型验证，再把方案整理成 PRD 和可拆分 issues。
symptoms_to_catch: the route collapses to generic implementation and hides the design stack
unrelated ML or analysis helpers enter because of weak textual overlap

failure_examples: the surfaced set only names implementation or issue breakdown without domain or interface design
the surfaced set has planning output helpers but no prototype or architecture lane

cases.prompt: 审阅一篇已有的医学机器学习论文草稿：检查实验设计和统计方法是否站得住脚，指出证据薄弱处，重写摘要和讨论，让中文表达更像真人。
symptoms_to_catch: the route mistakes review and rewrite for fresh model building
the surfaced set misses either the audit lane or the rewrite lane

failure_examples: the surfaced set only exposes critique without any writing or rewrite helper
the surfaced set only exposes writing polish without methodology or statistics review

cases.prompt: 分析一个目标检测项目为什么小目标 mAP 很差：需要从误检漏检模式、数据标注、训练策略和评估口径找原因，最后整理成图和技术结论。
symptoms_to_catch: generic context or planning skills outrank the real computer-vision owner
the surfaced set sees CV but misses audit or figure output

failure_examples: the surfaced set only exposes a CV owner but no audit or figure lane
the surfaced set is dominated by context or pool-building helpers and the CV owner is absent or demoted

cases.prompt: 精读一份很长的技术 RFC 和配套设计文档，提炼核心论证和隐藏假设，用第一性原理挑战方案，再输出一份给中文团队看的说人话决策备忘录。
symptoms_to_catch: the route mistakes document analysis for bug diagnosis
the surfaced set sees abstract reasoning but misses the reader-facing briefing lane

failure_examples: the surfaced set only exposes critique or diagnosis without deep reading
the surfaced set only exposes reading or reasoning but no team-facing memo or humanized Chinese write-up

cases.prompt: 排查一个本地 pandas + scikit-learn 分析流水线为什么又慢又吃 CPU：先区分是算法问题还是工程实现问题，再判断哪些步骤值得迁移到 GPU，并给出验证计划。
symptoms_to_catch: the route over-privileges the ML owner and hides the diagnosis lane
supporting GPU migration expertise stays in shortlist noise instead of becoming part of the surfaced plan

failure_examples: the surfaced set only names scikit-learn and never exposes diagnosis or GPU migration
the surfaced set jumps straight to acceleration suggestions without an analysis or validation lane
